response_constraints: Retrieve the existing summary before issuing the dependent summary update.
Confirm the change only after memory_update_summary succeeds, without claiming unrelated memories changed.

stages.purpose: Read the current recursive summary so its unrelated facts can be preserved.

arguments.summary: Neighborhood picnic: park permit approved. Food vendors undecided. Rain plan is the recreation center.

stages.purpose: Write the revised full summary after incorporating the retrieved content and the user's single requested change.

state_assertions: summary == "Neighborhood picnic: park permit approved. Food vendors undecided. Rain plan is the recreation center."

prompt: Open my neighborhood-picnic planning summary and change the rain plan from the library hall to the recreation center. Keep the permit and food-vendor details exactly as they are.

tool_results.summary: Neighborhood picnic: park permit approved. Food vendors undecided. Rain plan is the library hall.
